content.en:
Soon, Shake Shadow and another being who had surpassed the Origin Upper Realm Overlord level were down to business.

"In a little while, we'll have to harvest the fruit, right?"

"Well, the above has already decided, this place has been cultivated for 10 million years to the Dao Era, and the fruit is already ripe! During this time, it is estimated that the above will come to check, don't do the thing of stealing the origin!"

"I know, be honest during this time, otherwise you will steal too much of the origin, which will affect the ripeness of the fruit, and make the upper authorities angry, you and I will be unlucky!"

As they spoke, their voices fell silent.

......

"The Blood Raven is dead!"

The Origin Dao Ancestors of the Reincarnation Clan were a little sorry and a little frightened.

They were afraid that the entire reincarnation clan would be threatened, but fortunately, nothing had happened in the past period of time, and they were relieved.

And this matter, the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and the Reincarnation Source Clan didn't know about it at all, and Ye Tian naturally didn't know either.

At this time.

Ye Tian was still working hard for the limit of the sixth balance.

Time flies.

Ye Tian's cultivation is improving rapidly, and his strength is also steadily improving.

After about 100 million primeval years, he realized that something was wrong.

"Something is wrong, the energy of the land on the other side of eternity is decreasing!"

Ye Tian frowned.

If that's all there is to it, then that's all, but the energy of the reincarnation domain is also decreasing.

"It's the source that is decreasing!"

Ye Tian's eyes spied on the origin, and he completely understood.

If the source reduction is smaller, it will have no effect.

After all, when a cultivator breaks through, he or she has to absorb the power of the origin, and when the cultivator falls, he will feed back the origin, and the origin will slowly grow.

Therefore, a temporary reduction in origin cannot affect the land of the eternal shore and the realm of reincarnation.

But now, the reduction of the origin is too great, and it is still decreasing, which has caused the energy of the land on the other side of eternity and the reincarnation domain to decrease rapidly.

If this continued, it would be difficult for all kinds of precious resources to be bred, and it would be even more difficult for those Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors to become the Overlords of the Origin Upper Realm.

Of course.

In this case, the impact on the weak beings is not great, but the impact on the Origin Upper Realm Overlord is great.

At first, many Origin Upper Realm Overlords didn't care too much, but after a while, everyone had to care.

Reincarnation domain.

The high-ranking members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan gathered together to discuss this matter.

Yazu, Junzu, and Trout Ancestor and other overlords of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm were all in a very bad mood.

"Everyone, you should all feel that the origin of the reincarnation domain is greatly decreasing, causing the energy of the entire reincarnation domain to decline, and if this continues, many resources that will help us improve our strength will no longer be born. "

"It should be something wrong with the origin of the reincarnation domain, and the reincarnation clan should know something!"

"Will the Samsara Clan tell us?"

"The foundation of the reincarnation clan is in the origin of the reincarnation domain, and if something happens to the origin of the reincarnation domain, they are the most anxious, so they will definitely say it!"

"Then contact them!"

At the same time, the reincarnation source clan also panicked.

They know more than the reincarnation celestials.

They knew very well that outside the reincarnation domain was a prison, could it be that the ancestor of the reincarnation had angered the existence outside the prison?

But this kind of thing, they will definitely not say.

......

Soon.

The Reincarnation Celestial Clan contacted the Reincarnation Clan, and the Reincarnation Clan was even more panicked at this time, believing that it was the Blood Raven that angered the existence above the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm.

Therefore, when they learned that the reincarnation celestial clan contacted them, they did not know how to reply.

But if this continues, the origin of the reincarnation domain will continue to decrease, and their cultivation will even decrease.

After all, the origin mark of the entire reincarnation clan is in the origin of the reincarnation domain, and the great reduction of the origin of the reincarnation domain will also weaken their origin mark, and their cultivation will naturally be reduced.

"Convene a meeting of the three clans, this is not a matter for our clan, maybe we can unite to solve it. "

The high-ranking members of the Reincarnation Clan decided.

Not long after, the top existences of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, the Reincarnation Clan, and the Reincarnation Source Clan, and the powerhouses of the level of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords gathered at the intersection of the three clans.

Yazu, Jun Zu, Trout Zu, Jaw Zu, Yizu and many other existences were discussed at the beginning.

"Sideburn Ancestor, you Reincarnation Clan are in charge of the origin of the Reincarnation Domain, you should know what happened, right?"

Yazu asked.

Then.

Sideburns Ancestor said: "I won't hide it from you, not long ago, the ancestor of the Blood Raven of my clan entered the depths of the origin of the reincarnation domain, which is a forbidden area, and any overlord of the Origin Upper Realm will have something wrong if he enters. After the Blood Raven Ancestor entered, he was severely injured by a finger, but he went again the second time and fell directly. This time, the origin of the reincarnation domain has been greatly reduced, and it should be that the forbidden area is devouring the origin of the reincarnation domain, but what exactly happened, we don't dare to go in. "

"A finger has severely damaged the ancestor of the Blood Raven, could it be an existence that has surpassed the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm???"

Yazu: They were shocked.

They didn't know this information before, and if something hadn't happened in the Reincarnation Domain, the Reincarnation Clan would not have said it at all.

"So, there is a wider world beyond the Reincarnation Domain, where there is an existence beyond the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm?" Jun Zu frowned.

Then.

Jaw Ancestor said: "Everyone, since something happened in the reincarnation domain, we will not hide it from the reincarnation source clan. Before he broke through in half a step, before he was about to fall, he cut open the reincarnation domain, exhausted all his strength, and saw a picture. "

As he spoke, he embodied the image of the prison.

"A prison !! at this time"

Many Origin Upper Realm Overlords were shocked.

"Yes!" Jaw Ancestor nodded, "This is a prison, and it covers the reincarnation domain, and it should also cover the land of eternity, the ruins of reincarnation, and other places. "

"It seems that our reincarnation domain is just a heaven and earth in prison!" Yazu's face became ugly.

If it was really a prison, wouldn't they be able to leave the realm of reincarnation?

If nothing happened to the Reincarnation Domain before, then that's it, they at least have hope of advancing to a higher realm.

However, the energy of the reincarnation domain is getting less and less, the resources in the future are getting lower and lower, and there are not many resources that can assist in cultivation, and it is even more difficult to break through to a higher realm.

The point is, if the existence that treats the reincarnation domain as a prison attack them, how can they resist it???

"We can't sit still, maybe we join forces and combine into a big array, breaking out from the position in the depths of the origin of the reincarnation domain, maybe we can get a glimpse of the mystery and understand the real truth!"

Sideburns proposed.
